theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy)
theme_and_archetype.description: An elegant, high-end SaaS design blending authoritative clarity with trustworthy, organic hues (Dark Teal and Mint Green). Employs high-contrast typography, bento grids, and generous spacing to avoid the generic AI SaaS look.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, py-24. Containers with borders MUST have p-8.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use 'Tetris' asymmetric bento grids (grid-cols-12) for features, and 'Control Room' dense grids (grid-cols-3 gap-6) for analytics showcases.

surface_styles.tracing_beam: Card with a delicate 1px border and a subtle mint-green glow shadow behind it. Used for SOA upload.
surface_styles.grid_borders: Features use border-collapse style with border-r and border-b in light gray.

hero_laptop.description: Sleek laptop showcasing data analytics and graphs

analytics_dashboard.description: graphs of performance analytics on a laptop screen

expert_chef.description: Professional chef in kitchen, represents expert operations

sections.name: Navigation
sections.layout: Fixed, z-50, dark glassmorphism (glassmorphism_dark) spanning full width. Logo text in Accent Mint.
sections.components: Navigation menu links, primary CTA button in Mint Green.

sections.name: Hero
sections.content: Smart Insights for Restaurants. Track sales, payouts, profits across Zomato & Swiggy.
sections.layout: Dark Teal background (bg-primary_teal). Split 50/50. Left: Huge H1 (text_inverse) with Mint Green overline. Right: hero_laptop image floating with a soft shadow and rounded-xl edges.

sections.name: Manage Every Outlet
sections.content: Track sales, payouts, profits across Zomato, Swiggy in one place.
sections.layout: Light background. Bento 'Control Room' grid. 3 columns showing abstract metric cards using simple HTML/Tailwind to represent Swiggy/Zomato dashboards.

sections.name: SOA Upload
sections.content: Turn complex SOA files into easy-to-read charts and metrics.
sections.layout: Two columns. Left: H2 + body. Right: Drag-and-drop zone styled with 'tracing_beam' aesthetic (dashed Mint Green border, bg-accent_mint_muted/30, subtle pulse animation).

sections.name: Expert Help
sections.layout: Editorial layout. Left: expert_chef image filling a tall column (h-full rounded-2xl object-cover). Right: Deep Dark Teal card overlapping slightly, with the text and CTA.

sections.name: Operations Handled
sections.content: Menu re-engineering, Digital marketing, GST, photoshoots.
sections.layout: Marquee strategy (The Editorial Ribbon). Massive outline text in background scrolling infinitely. Foreground: 4 clean, minimalist cards (glassmorphism) over modern_restaurant image.

sections.name: Why Choose BizzDeck
sections.content: All-in-one Dashboard, Real Insights, Trusted, Secure.
sections.layout: Technical Grid Borders layout. 2x2 grid where internal borders (border-r, border-b) are visible, creating a connected skeleton look.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Overlapping card layout or simple flex horizontal scroll. Use expert_owner image as one of the avatars.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.content: Lite, Plus, Pro plans. Monthly/Annual toggle.
sections.layout: 3 columns. Middle column (Plus) is scaled up slightly (scale-105), background is Dark Teal with White text, Mint Green CTA. Left and Right cards are white with Dark Teal text.
sections.components: Shadcn Tabs (for monthly/annual toggle), Shadcn Cards.

sections.name: What Makes Us Different
sections.layout: Asymmetric Tetris bento grid. Mix col-span-2 and col-span-1 to create visual tension.

sections.name: Final CTA & Footer
sections.layout: Massive Dark Teal block. Central aligned H2. Mint CTA. Footer links aligned to bottom with a massive 'BIZZDECK' text spanning the full width at the bottom.

components_required: framer-motion (for smooth entrance animations and marquee)

data_testid_conventions.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
